description: Configure a time-based alert suppression rule in Wazuh to silence false positives from a nightly backup process. Modify the Wazuh manager configuration in /var/ossec/etc/rules/local_rules.xml by creating a new rule with ID 100250. This rule must be a child of rule 5715 (SSHD authentication success), set to level 0, and configured to apply only to the user 'backup_svc' between 02:55 and 03:30. Apply the changes by restarting the Wazuh manager.
